name: Chocolate Mousse
method: Serves 4 100 g good-quality dark chocolate (70% cocoa solids) 40 g unsalted butter 50 ml Nocino liqueur (see Note) 4 organic eggs, separated 1 tablespoon cocoa powder, for sprinkling whipped cream, for serving
Melt the chocolate and butter (without stirring) in a bowl set over a saucepan of simmering water. Remove from the heat and stir in the Nocino followed by the egg yolks, combining well.
